name: shared-prefix-cpu-calib
description: Scenario B / I3 SLO-calibration probe: shared-prefix-cpu's distributions and 0.04 rps rate, but an 8-request stop and a DIFFERENT seed (2003004) so the scenario SLO is derived from measured maxima of a schedule that is not the measured run's own schedule. Covers the long-prompt/cold-prefill regime (and the decode-stall-during-concurrent-prefill regime) that the chat-short calibration cannot reach.
